- Green rectangle is at rows 29-49, cols 41-49.

- Green rect col range: 41-49
- The T needs to be at col ~41 to fit into the opening. That's about 41-14 = 27 pixels right, or 27/3 = 9 RIGHT moves.
- For vertical: T is at rows 11-25, green rect is at rows 29-49. The opening is on the left side of the green rect. The T needs to be vertically centered with the opening.
